ddt:Target.Name: N_P33A_DSMU_ADP_UDS_PT_20201016
ddt:Target.Description:
[2]Oct 16th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Solved DB checker's error based on V1.10.
[1]Oct 30th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Modified some data based on Rev1 to Rev4.
[N]Mar 19th, 2018 Nissan XX6 Initial Creation.

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: CLA ou OTTOMAN ou MCC to memorize(01h)
Easy access for CLA ou OTTOMAN ou MCC(01h)

Data.Name: Config.Data_$0232_#004_bit0_Driver Slide function under vehicle running

Item.Text: One massage is allowed if VehicleStates(01h)
Two massages are allowed if VehicleStates(02h)
Unlimited number of massage according HVChargerStatus parameter(03h)

Data.Name: Config.Data_$0265_#004_bit0_slide rear length to hard stroke / nominal position
Config.Data_$0266_#004_bit0_slope upper length to hard stroke / nominal position
Config.Data_$0267_#004_bit0_cla front length to hard stroke / nominal position
Config.Data_$0268_#004_bit0_ottoman lower length to hard stroke / nominal position
Config.Data_$0269_#004_bit0_lift upper length to hard stroke / nominal position
Config.Data_$0270_#004_bit0_recliner front length to hard stroke / nominal position
Config.Data_$0404_#004_bit0_MCC front length to hard stroke / nominal position
Config.Data_$0290_#004_bit0_SEAT Slope distance when Easy Exit (L_SlopeEasyAccess
Config.Data_$0291_#004_bit0_SEAT CLA distance when Easy Exit (L_CLAEasyAccess)
Config.Data_$0292_#004_bit0_SEAT OTTOMAN distance when Easy Exit (L_OttomanEasyAccess)
Config.Data_$0294_#004_bit0_SEAT Lift distance when Easy Exit (L_LiftEasyAccess)
Config.Data_$0295_#004_bit0_SEAT Recliner distance when Easy Exit (L_ReclinerEasyAccess
Config.Data_$02A1_#008_bit0_MC1 Egonomic Abacus Control / cushion slope
Config.Data_$02A2_#008_bit0_MC2 Egonomic Abacus Sensation / cushion slope
Config.Data_$02A3_#008_bit0_MC3 Egonomic Abacus Relax / cushion slope
Config.Data_$02A4_#008_bit0_MC4 Egonomic Abacus Vision / cushion slope

Item.Text: No DTC motor ottoman ou cla ou MCC(00h)
DTC motor ottoman ou CLA ou MCC activated(01h)

Data.Name: DataRead_$0101_#004_bit4_(TBD) State CLA/Ottoman adjustment switch forward
DataRead_$0101_#004_bit3_(TBD) State CLA/Ottoman adjustment switch backward
DataRead_$0101_#006_bit6_(TBD) State Backrest Bolster Right switch Forward
DataRead_$0101_#006_bit5_(TBD) State Backrest Bolster Right switch Backward
DataRead_$0101_#005_bit4_(TBD) State Backrest Bolster Left switch Forward
DataRead_$0101_#006_bit3_(TBD) State Backrest Bolster Left switch Backward
DataRead_$0261_#018_bit0_(TBD) Position Motor Backrest Bolster Right
DataRead_$0261_#020_bit0_(TBD) Position Motor Backrest Bolster Left
DataRead_$0501_#004_bit7_(TBD)SEAT Slide setting when Easy Exit.
DataRead_$0503_#004_bit7_(TBD)SEAT Slide distance when Easy Exit (L_SlidingEasyAccess)
OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Data.Name: IOCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to InputOutputControl request

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifier
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Item.Text: (TBD)rear seat positioning and end stop learning

Data.Name: DataWrite.WS_$0501_#004_bit7_(TBD)SEAT Slide setting when Easy Exit.
DataWrite.WS_$0503_#004_bit7_(TBD)SEAT Slide distance when Easy Exit (L_SlidingEasyAccess)
